rules.title:
The
Casting
rules.tagline: Play the scene according to your secret number

steps.title: A guesser is chosen
steps.desc: They observe. The others are actors.

steps.title: Each actor gets a secret number
steps.desc: From 1 (catastrophic) to 10 (oscar). The guesser doesn't know.

steps.title: The guesser reads a scenario
steps.desc: Example: "Tripping at the cafeteria with your tray".

steps.title: Everyone plays the scene
steps.desc: Based on their number: 1 = terrible, 10 = mind-blowing performance.

steps.title: The guesser guesses the numbers
steps.descDrink: They assign a number to each actor. The more they're wrong, the more they drink.
steps.descSober: They assign a number to each actor. The more they're wrong, the more they accumulate.

pickDevin.title:
Choose the
casting jury
pickDevin.sub: The guesser watches, judges, and guesses the numbers.

scenario.hint:
Read this scenario out loud.
Then pass the phone to each actor to see their number.

handoff.sub: Look at your number in secret before pressing.

perform.hint:
Each actor plays the scene based on their number.
{{devin}} watches carefully.

daily: Tripping in the cafeteria with a full tray
Seeing a huge spider in the shower and screaming
